title: Phytip Protein A, ProPlus, ProPlus LX Columns - Neutralization
author: Opentrons
description: Since the elution buffer supplied along with PhyTip® Protein A, ProPlus or ProPlus LX Columns is highly acidic (pH 2.5), this protocol (Neutralization) is developed to transfer the neutralization buffer (pH 9.0) to the final product of protein purification (elution plate) to adjust the pH.
steps_raw: Since the elution buffer supplied along with PhyTip® Protein A, ProPlus or ProPlus LX Columns is highly acidic (pH 2.5), this protocol (Neutralization) is developed to transfer the neutralization buffer (pH 9.0) to the final product of protein purification (elution plate) to adjust the pH.
Transfer neutralization buffer (slot 10) to each well containing the eluate (slot 11)
materials_raw: Thermo Scientific 96 Well Plate V Bottom 450 uL #249944/249946
Opentrons 15 Tube Rack with NEST 15 mL Conical
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
